end,function(I,B)local X=i(B)local y=function(y,o)return w(I,{y;o},B,X)end return y end return(j(3622086-(-314516),{}))(X(N))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[B(675575-738141)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
